name: All-American Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream the butter, shortening, and sugars.
2. Beat in the egg and vanilla.
3. Combine the flour, baking soda, and salt; stir into the butter mixture, mixing well.
4. Stir in the chocolate chips and nuts.
5. Drop by teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto greased baking sheets.
6. Bake at 350°F for 8-10 minutes, just until edges are golden (centers will still be soft).
7. Remove to wire racks to cool.
Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
